docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGE PRO TEM SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY HEGGI, ELISE JOHNSON, DAVID

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-16-2019 - JUDGMENT.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HEGGI, ELISE AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DAVID
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HEGGI, ELISE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT JOHNSON, DAVID STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-16-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-16-2019 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN. PLAINTIFF ELISE HEGGI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT DAVID JOHNSON IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT STIPULATED TO JUDGE PROTEM. NO PROOF OF SERVICES FILED ON DEFENDANT. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CARL CHAMBERLIN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
